---
name: Feature Request / User Story
about: Propose a new feature or user story for the application
title: "US-XX: "
labels: "user-story, priority: medium"
assignees: ""
---

## User Story
As a [role], I want to [action], so that [benefit].

## Problem Statement
A clear description of the problem this feature solves or the gap it fills.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Story Points
Estimated effort: <!-- 1 = trivial, 2 = small, 3 = medium, 5 = large, 8 = complex -->

## Mockups / Examples
If applicable, add sketches, mockups, or examples.

## Additional Context
Any other context, constraints, or dependencies for this feature.
